summary: Iteration 156 - Comprehensive E2E UAT completed for all 4 commercial flows (Service, Promo Sample, Promo Custom, Product Order). All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: QuoteRequestPage 3-lane picker working, URL pre-selection working, Admin portal functional with Requests Inbox, Payments Queue, Orders list. Vendor visibility restrictions confirmed - no customer_price/margin exposed.
critical_code_review_comments: Vendor visibility correctly enforced in vendor_orders_routes.py - strips customer_price, margin, sell_price from responses
Status transition policy in status_transition_policy.py correctly restricts vendor to internal statuses only
Sales delivery override in sales_delivery_override_routes.py correctly allows sales to control logistics statuses
Public request intake via public_request_routes.py correctly accepts canonical request_types
Request to lead conversion in requests_module_routes.py working correctly
Payment queue in admin_facade_routes.py shows payer_name separately from customer_name (identity verification)
Customer checkout quote in customer_checkout_quote_routes.py creates quotes with delivery_address
seed_data_creation: Created test requests via /api/public-requests for service_quote, promo_sample, promo_custom types
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 commercial flows tested and working: (1) Flow B Service Request - guest submits service_quote, appears in admin inbox, converts to lead, appears in CRM. (2) Flow D Promo Sample - guest submits promo_sample, appears in admin inbox. (3) Flow C Promo Custom - guest submits promo_custom with branding details. (4) Flow A Product Order - customer checkout quote creates quote, admin sees payment queue. Vendor visibility verified - vendor orders API strips customer_price/margin/sell_price, only exposes vendor_price. Sales delivery override tested - sales can update logistics statuses after ready_for_pickup. CRM flow tested - leads list and status update working. Identity verification tested - payer_name shown separately from customer_name in payments queue.

vendor_visibility.vendor_orders: PASS - GET /api/vendor/orders returns orders without customer_price/margin
vendor_visibility.vendor_status_transitions: PASS - Vendor can update internal statuses
vendor_visibility.vendor_logistics_blocked: PASS - Vendor cannot set logistics statuses

identity_verification.payment_queue_payer: PASS - Payment queue shows payer_name field

request_type_correctness.valid_types: PASS - service_quote, promo_custom, promo_sample, product_bulk accepted

frontend_quote_request_page.three_lane_picker: PASS - Products, Promotional Materials, Services lanes visible
frontend_quote_request_page.conditional_fields: PASS - Service Category dropdown appears when Services selected

admin_portal.dashboard: PASS - Shows metrics (Total Revenue, Orders, Partners, Affiliates)
admin_portal.requests_inbox: PASS - Shows requests with NEW badge
admin_portal.orders_list: PASS - Shows orders with customer, payer, total, status
admin_portal.payments_queue: PASS - Shows payment proofs with payer separate from customer
